auth_privacy_note: Your health data is stored securely on EU servers and never shared without your consent.
welcome_headline: Understand your body through the change.
welcome_subtitle: SYNA connects your daily check-ins and wearable data into insights you and your doctor can act on.
register_subtitle: Create your account to begin tracking, in about two minutes a day.
register_verification_prompt: Enter the verification code sent to your email.
login_subtitle: Pick up where you left off.
forgot_password_email_prompt: Enter your email to receive a reset code.
forgot_password_verify_prompt: Enter the code from your email and choose a new password.
auth_generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth_reset_success: Password reset complete. You can now log in.
tab_start_placeholder: Your daily overview will live here.
tab_patterns_placeholder: Your symptom patterns will live here.
tab_syna_placeholder: Your daily check-in will live here.
tab_report_placeholder: Your doctor report will live here.
tab_profile_placeholder: Your profile and settings will live here.
health_connect_subtitle: Allow SYNA to read recent wearable data from Apple Health or Health Connect. For now, we will show the raw JSON so we can inspect the device data structure.
health_connect_raw_payload_hint: Prototype view: this is the exact payload returned by the native health APIs.
health_connect_rebuild_hint: If the app closes immediately, rebuild the dev client from client/: npx expo run:ios
profile_tab_health_record_placeholder: Your health record will live here.
profile_missing_patterns_title: For more precise patterns, still missing:
profile_missing_patterns_hint: Every detail makes SYNA more precise.
profile_health_sources_hint: On iOS, open the Health app to change permissions. On Android, use Health Connect settings.
profile_health_unsupported_subtitle: Health connections are available on iOS and Android devices.
profile_completion_hint: Tap here to complete your profile
